shots.reasoning_brief: Visual-only shot focusing on SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD; no dialogue or props; scene establishment in kindergarten.
Dialogue from small boy to SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD; visible characters include both; no props.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我有一个很重要的事要做。

shots.reasoning_brief: Response dialogue; focus on SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD; listener inferred from context.
Follow-up question; both characters visible.
Secretive response; focus on speaker.
Security addressing child; both in frame.
Elevator interaction; businessman looks down at child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 找我爸爸。他在最高的地方。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child's serious response; solo focus.
Scene shift to meeting room; LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN with report, ZHAO_YIMING_ASSISTANT behind; prop DOCUMENT_REPORT_01 introduced but no handoff.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_DEPARTMENT_MANAGER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: ……第三季度的营收同比增长了12%，主要得益于——

shots.reasoning_brief: Manager reporting to LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN; inherits DOCUMENT_REPORT_01 context but no explicit handoff.
ZHAO_YIMING_ASSISTANT reacts first; approaches child.
Visual action: child walks to LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN; no dialogue.
Child questions LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN directly.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 这是我画的我们一家三口的画。你看，中间这个黑色的就是我爸爸。因为我还不知道他长什么样。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child shows drawing; new prop PHOTO_01 introduced, no prior handoff.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 但是！今天我在学校看到你的照片了。妈咪带我去医院那天也见过你。我觉得——你就是那个黑色的人。

shots.reasoning_brief: Continuation of explanation; PHOTO_01 held by child from previous.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 陆叔叔，你是不是我爸爸？

shots.reasoning_brief: Direct question; no prop handoff yet.

prop_handoffs.source_evidence: 他伸出手，把那张画接了过来。

shots.reasoning_brief: LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN takes drawing; handoff from SH14 via context; low voice to child.
Child follows up; drawing now with LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN.
LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN ends meeting; addresses group.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: ZHAO_YIMING_ASSISTANT
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 陆总……要不要通知沈小姐——

shots.reasoning_brief: ZHAO_YIMING_ASSISTANT whispers to LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN; three remain.
LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN interrupts, looking at child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我自己坐电梯上来的！68楼是最高！我知道我爸爸一定在最高的地方！

shots.reasoning_brief: Child explains enthusiastically.
LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN orders meal; new prop KIDS_MEAL_01 implied but no handoff.
ZHAO_YIMING_ASSISTANT surprised.
Explanation for ordering; places drawing on table.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 叔叔，你果然是我爸爸。你看，你第一次见我就请我吃饭。我同学说，爸爸就是会请小孩吃饭的人。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child's logical conclusion.

music_cues: 钢琴轻起，温暖如阳光穿透阴云
shots.reasoning_brief: Transition shot; music cue; visual of LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN and shift to SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN anxious.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 你们怎么看的孩子？他才四岁——

shots.reasoning_brief: Scene change; SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN upset with teacher.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 对不起沈女士，他趁做游戏的时候从侧门溜出去的——

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher apologizes; no inheritance from prior scene.
Phone call start; offscreen listener.
SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN fearful response on phone.

music_cues: 大提琴低音，紧迫感升起
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual-only ending; SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN walks steadily; music cue; scene transition.
